title: Product truth stop-line gates
fail_closed_semantics: SQL error, timeout, NULL, non-finite value, or denominator 0 is error/blocked, never GREEN.

gates.description: Zero published reports may contain a fact block whose backing event is not verified. Counts fact blocks inside published report payloads joined to their evidence events.
gates.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM content.report report JOIN content.report_evidence evidence ON evidence.report_id = report.report_id AND evidence.evidence_type = 'event' JOIN knowledge.event event ON event.event_id = evidence.evidence_id CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_path_query(report.report_payload, '$.sections[*].blocks[*] ? (@.block_type == "fact")') AS fact_block WHERE report.status = 'published' AND report.published_at >= (SELECT applied_at FROM ops.truth_gate_policy WHERE policy_key = 'b0_product_truth_stop_line') AND event.verification_status <> 'verified'

gates.description: Same-day rerun refreshes as_of/data_cutoff/knowledge_snapshot_id/finished_at instead of reusing stale run metadata.

The serving impact surface exposes exactly the evidence-backed path set: sum(path_count) equals the count of unexpired paths whose every edge has immutable relation evidence (empty-edge paths excluded). Any mismatch means unbacked exposure or dropped backed paths.
gates.sql: SELECT abs(coalesce((SELECT sum(path_count) FROM serving.impact_summary_v1), 0) - (SELECT count(*) FROM analytics.impact_path path JOIN core.v_security_universe universe ON universe.security_entity_id = path.target_entity_id WHERE path.expires_at > now() AND cardinality(path.path_edges) > 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(path.path_edges) AS edge(relation_id) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM knowledge.relation_evidence evidence WHERE evidence.relation_id = edge.relation_id))))

gates.description: Product read models degrade availability to stale/missing on old or absent rows; unparsable timestamps fail closed to stale.
Zero pending documents outside the explicit allowlist (news in-flight, disclosure surfaced-B4-backlog). Non-extraction source types must be explicitly skipped with a reason.
gates.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM knowledge.document WHERE processing_status = 'pending' AND source_type NOT IN ('news', 'disclosure')
